name: redis-memory
description: Persistent cross-session memory for AI agents. Two storage modes: semantic vector search (mem_*) for knowledge found by meaning, and key-value store (kv_*) for instant lookup. Auto-expiry via TTL + volatile-lru eviction.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: "dedicated" (this client starts its own Redis+TEI backend) or "shared" (connect to a backend already running elsewhere)

redis_url.title: Redis URL
redis_url.description: Redis connection URL. Required when mode is "shared" (e.g. redis://127.0.0.1:6379/0)

embed_url.title: Embeddings URL
embed_url.description: TEI embeddings endpoint. Required when mode is "shared" (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8081)

namespace.title: Namespace
namespace.description: Isolates this client's kv_*/mem_* data on a shared instance. Leave empty for the fleet-wide/shared default

network.title: Podman/Docker network
network.description: Join this container network instead of relying on host.docker.internal. Needed when the shared backend publishes no host port (e.g. loopback-only or no port at all) -- lets this container reach it by name on the shared network. Leave empty to use host.docker.internal as before

embed_socket.title: Embeddings Unix socket path
embed_socket.description: Path to a Unix socket proxying the embeddings endpoint (e.g. via a socat sidecar). When set, embedding requests go over this socket instead of EMBED_URL's host/port.

socket_dir.title: Shared socket directory to bind-mount
socket_dir.description: Host directory containing redis_url's/embed_socket's Unix socket files. When set, this directory is bind-mounted into the bridge container at the same path, and the container joins the socket owner's group (--group-add keep-groups) so it can actually reach group-gated sockets owned by a different host user.
